detaileddescription.para: Defines the prefix for MLMediaGenericResult codes.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Generic return values for Multimedia API calls.
Defines the prefix for MLMediaResult codes.
Unknown Media Codec Resource Request Error.
Invalid Request on Media Codec Resources.

briefdescription.para: Only Hardware Media Codec Resources are available. This error code is a result of requesting for Software Media Codec Resource that is not available.
Only Software Media Codec Resources are available. This error code is a result of requesting for Hardware Media Codec Resource that is not available.

detaileddescription.para: No more (Hardware or Software) Media Codec Resources available.
No more Hardware Media Codec Resources available.
No more Software Media Codec Resources available.

briefdescription.para: Media Codec Resource request made with Invalid Codec parameters. This error code could be a result of one of these cases (not limited to):

listitem.para: Requested video frame width or height is beyond the maximum resolution (width or height) supported.
Requested Framerate/Sample rate/Bitratre/Channel count is not supported.

detaileddescription.para: Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Detailed return values for Multimedia API calls.
Defines the prefix for MLMediaDRMResult codes.
Error code for undefined type.
Error code for no DRM license.
Error code for DRM license expired.
Error code for DRM session not expired.
Error code for DRM when decrypt unit is not initialized.
Error code for DRM when failed to decrypt data.
Error code for DRM can not handle the operation.
Error code for DRM when data is tampered.

briefdescription.para: Error Code when an operation on a MLMediaDRM handle is attempted and the device does not have a certificate. The app should obtain and install a certificate using the MLMediaDRM provisioning methods then retry the operation.

detaileddescription.para: Error code for Device License Revoked.
Error code if the MLMediaDRM operation fails when the required resources are in use.
Error code for insufficient output protection.
Range for vendor specific DRM errors.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
DRM related return values for Multimedia API calls.
Defines the prefix for OMX specific error codes.
Defines the prefix for OMX extensions specific error codes.
Defines the prefix for OMX vendor specific error codes.
Defines the prefix for MLMediaPlayerResult codes.
Media errors (eg. Codec not supported).
Runtime errors.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Media player related return values for Multimedia API calls.
Generic return values for Multimedia API calls.
Detailed return values for Multimedia API calls.
DRM related return values for Multimedia API calls.
Media player related return values for Multimedia API calls.

memberdef.argsstring: ((deprecated("Use standard Android SDK and NDK APIs."))) const char *MLMediaResultGetString(MLResult code)
memberdef.name: __attribute__

param.type: (deprecated("Use standard Android SDK and NDK APIs."))

briefdescription.para: Translate a media error code into a human-readable string.

parameterdescription.para: Error code to translate to a string.

simplesect.para: C-style ASCII string containing readable version of result code. Note that user should not keep a reference to the returned char pointer for future use as subsequent calls to MLMediaResultGetString will overwrite its content. Consequently, user must not explicitly free the returned pointer.
